concepts.label: Company
concepts.name: TSMC
concepts.description: World's largest dedicated semiconductor foundry, manufactures chips for Apple, NVIDIA, AMD, Qualcomm at leading-edge nodes

concepts.label: Company
concepts.name: Samsung Electronics
concepts.description: Vertically integrated IDM and foundry: logic, DRAM, NAND, and advanced packaging

concepts.label: Company
concepts.name: Intel Corporation
concepts.description: x86 CPU designer and IDM attempting foundry re-entry with Intel 18A process

concepts.label: Company
concepts.name: SK Hynix
concepts.description: Leading DRAM and HBM manufacturer; primary supplier of HBM3E for NVIDIA H100/H200

concepts.label: Company
concepts.name: Micron Technology
concepts.description: US-based DRAM and NAND flash manufacturer; expanding HBM production

concepts.label: Company
concepts.name: ASML Holding
concepts.description: Sole manufacturer of EUV lithography scanners; critical bottleneck in advanced chip manufacturing

concepts.label: Company
concepts.name: Applied Materials
concepts.description: Largest semiconductor equipment maker: CVD, PVD, etch, CMP, inspection tools

concepts.label: Company
concepts.name: Lam Research
concepts.description: Leading plasma etch and ALD/CVD deposition equipment supplier

concepts.label: Company
concepts.name: KLA Corporation
concepts.description: Dominant supplier of process control, defect inspection, and metrology equipment

concepts.label: Company
concepts.name: Tokyo Electron
concepts.description: Japanese equipment maker: etch, ALD, track/coater systems; strong in Japan and TSMC supply chain

concepts.label: Company
concepts.name: NVIDIA Corporation
concepts.description: Designer of AI accelerator GPUs (H100, H200, Blackwell); dominant in AI training market

concepts.label: Company
concepts.name: AMD
concepts.description: CPU/GPU designer competing with NVIDIA in AI accelerators (MI300X) and Intel in CPUs

concepts.label: Company
concepts.name: Qualcomm
concepts.description: Mobile SoC and modem designer; fabless, relies on TSMC

concepts.label: Company
concepts.name: Broadcom Inc.
concepts.description: Networking ASICs, custom AI accelerators, RF chips; acquired VMware

concepts.label: Company
concepts.name: MediaTek
concepts.description: Leading mobile SoC designer for Android; second largest fabless company

concepts.label: Company
concepts.name: Arm Holdings
concepts.description: CPU/GPU IP licensor; virtually all mobile chips use Arm ISA; owned by SoftBank

concepts.label: Company
concepts.name: Synopsys
concepts.description: EDA software leader: synthesis, simulation, verification, silicon IP

concepts.label: Company
concepts.name: Cadence Design Systems
concepts.description: EDA software: physical design, custom IC, verification; close partner of TSMC

concepts.label: Company
concepts.name: GlobalFoundries
concepts.description: Specialty foundry (RF, automotive, IoT); exited leading-edge race in 2018

concepts.label: Company
concepts.name: SMIC
concepts.description: China's largest foundry; restricted from EUV access; under US Entity List

concepts.label: Company
concepts.name: UMC
concepts.description: Taiwan foundry specializing in mature nodes (28nm and above)

concepts.label: Company
concepts.name: ASE Group
concepts.description: World's largest OSAT (outsourced semiconductor assembly and test)

concepts.label: Company
concepts.name: Amkor Technology
concepts.description: Second largest OSAT; strong in advanced packaging (flip-chip, wafer-level)

concepts.label: Company
concepts.name: Ajinomoto Fine-Techno
concepts.description: Sole original developer of ABF (Ajinomoto Build-up Film) substrate — critical bottleneck for AI package substrates

concepts.label: Company
concepts.name: Ibiden Co.
concepts.description: Major ABF substrate manufacturer; key supplier for Intel and NVIDIA packages

concepts.label: Company
concepts.name: Shin-Etsu Chemical
concepts.description: World's largest silicon wafer maker; also major EUV photoresist supplier

concepts.label: Company
concepts.name: Sumco Corporation
concepts.description: Second largest silicon wafer manufacturer; duopoly with Shin-Etsu for 300mm wafers

concepts.label: Company
concepts.name: Siltronic
concepts.description: German silicon wafer manufacturer; third-largest globally

concepts.label: Company
concepts.name: Entegris
concepts.description: Critical materials supplier: CMP slurries, filters, FOUPs, gas purification for fabs

concepts.label: Company
concepts.name: JSR Corporation
concepts.description: Leading EUV and ArF photoresist maker; also semiconductor materials; acquired by JIC

concepts.label: Company
concepts.name: Tokyo Ohka Kogyo
concepts.description: Photoresist and process chemicals maker; ArF immersion market leader

concepts.label: Company
concepts.name: Air Products and Chemicals
concepts.description: Industrial gases: ultra-pure NF3, N2, H2 for semiconductor fabs

concepts.label: Company
concepts.name: Kioxia
concepts.description: World's second largest NAND flash manufacturer; formerly Toshiba Memory

concepts.label: Company
concepts.name: Western Digital
concepts.description: NAND flash and HDD manufacturer; JV with Kioxia for NAND production

concepts.label: Company
concepts.name: Zeiss SMT
concepts.description: Sole supplier of EUV optical systems for ASML scanners; single source critical component

concepts.label: Company
concepts.name: Cymer
concepts.description: ASML subsidiary; makes DUV excimer laser light sources; co-develops EUV sources

concepts.label: Company
concepts.name: Trumpf
concepts.description: German industrial laser maker; sole supplier of CO2 driver laser for EUV plasma source

concepts.label: Company
concepts.name: Kokusai Electric
concepts.description: Batch furnace ALD/CVD systems; TSMC and Samsung key supplier; spun off from Hitachi

concepts.label: Company
concepts.name: Screen Holdings
concepts.description: Wafer cleaning, track/coater systems, and substrate inspection equipment

concepts.label: Company
concepts.name: Axcelis Technologies
concepts.description: Ion implantation equipment; Purion series is industry standard for advanced logic

concepts.label: Company
concepts.name: Onto Innovation
concepts.description: Process control metrology and inspection; competes with KLA in thin-film and overlay

concepts.label: Company
concepts.name: Disco Corporation
concepts.description: Dicing saws and laser processing systems for wafer singulation

concepts.label: Company
concepts.name: Kulicke & Soffa
concepts.description: Wire bonding and thermocompression bonding equipment; advanced packaging tools

concepts.label: Company
concepts.name: Besi
concepts.description: Die bonding equipment; thermocompression bonders for advanced packages

concepts.label: Company
concepts.name: Hoya Corporation
concepts.description: Photomask substrates and EUV mask blanks; optical glass; near-monopoly on EUV mask blanks

concepts.label: Company
concepts.name: Photronics
concepts.description: Photomask manufacturer for IC and flat panel display

concepts.label: Company
concepts.name: Merck KGaA
concepts.description: Semiconductor materials: photoresists, process chemicals, CMP materials, ALD precursors

concepts.label: Company
concepts.name: DuPont de Nemours
concepts.description: Semiconductor materials: photoresists, dielectrics, cleaning chemicals

concepts.label: Company
concepts.name: Unimicron Technology
concepts.description: PCB and IC substrate (ABF) manufacturer; key supplier for Intel

concepts.label: Company
concepts.name: Shinko Electric Industries
concepts.description: IC substrates (BGA, FC-BGA) manufacturer; key supplier for Intel and AMD

concepts.label: Company
concepts.name: Marvell Technology
concepts.description: Data infrastructure chips: networking, storage, 5G; custom AI ASICs for hyperscalers

concepts.label: Company
concepts.name: Apple Silicon
concepts.description: Apple's in-house chip design (M-series, A-series); largest TSMC customer by revenue

concepts.label: Company
concepts.name: Google DeepMind
concepts.description: TPU designer and AI research lab; major hyperscaler AI compute purchaser

concepts.label: Company
concepts.name: Amazon Web Services
concepts.description: Largest cloud provider; designs Trainium/Inferentia chips; major NVIDIA customer

concepts.label: Company
concepts.name: Microsoft Azure
concepts.description: Cloud provider; OpenAI exclusive compute partner; major AI accelerator purchaser

concepts.label: Company
concepts.name: JCET Group
concepts.description: China's largest OSAT; acquired Stats ChipPAC; competes in advanced packaging

concepts.label: Company
concepts.name: Powerchip Semiconductor
concepts.description: Taiwan foundry for DRAM and specialty logic; partner for ProMOS

concepts.label: Company
concepts.name: Tower Semiconductor
concepts.description: Specialty foundry: RF, power, imaging, BCD processes; acquired by Intel attempt failed

concepts.label: Company
concepts.name: Hermes Microvision
concepts.description: ASML subsidiary making e-beam wafer inspection systems for advanced nodes

concepts.label: Company
concepts.name: Coherent Corp.
concepts.description: Optical components: lasers, optics for semiconductor lithography and communications

concepts.label: Material
concepts.name: 300mm Silicon Wafer
concepts.description: Primary substrate for advanced logic and memory chips; duopoly supply from Shin-Etsu and Sumco

concepts.label: Material
concepts.name: 200mm Silicon Wafer
concepts.description: Substrate for mature-node chips (power, analog, RF, MEMS); supply tightened in auto shortage

concepts.label: Material
concepts.name: Silicon Carbide Wafer
concepts.description: Wide-bandgap substrate for power electronics in EVs and industrial; shortage vs EV demand

concepts.label: Material
concepts.name: ABF Substrate
concepts.description: Advanced IC packaging substrate; critical bottleneck for AI chip packaging; Ajinomoto holds key patent

concepts.label: Material
concepts.name: EUV Photoresist
concepts.description: Light-sensitive coating used in EUV lithography; JSR, Shin-Etsu, and Inpria are main suppliers

concepts.label: Material
concepts.name: ArF Immersion Photoresist
concepts.description: Photoresist for DUV immersion lithography at 193nm; most widely used in high-volume fabs

concepts.label: Material
concepts.name: EUV Pellicle
concepts.description: Ultra-thin membrane protecting EUV mask from particle contamination; ASML key challenge

concepts.label: Material
concepts.name: EUV Photomask
concepts.description: Reflective mask used in EUV lithography; made on Hoya mask blanks; extremely expensive

concepts.label: Material
concepts.name: DUV Photomask
concepts.description: Transmissive mask for DUV lithography; lower cost than EUV masks

concepts.label: Material
concepts.name: Neon Gas
concepts.description: Used in ArF excimer lasers for DUV lithography; Ukraine produced ~70% of world supply pre-2022

concepts.label: Material
concepts.name: Krypton Gas
concepts.description: Used in KrF excimer lasers and as fill gas; production concentrated in steel industry byproduct

concepts.label: Material
concepts.name: Nitrogen Trifluoride
concepts.description: Plasma cleaning gas for CVD and ALD chambers; strong GHG but necessary process gas

concepts.label: Material
concepts.name: Hydrogen Fluoride
concepts.description: Essential etchant for silicon oxide; also used in cleaning; Japan major supplier; export controlled

concepts.label: Material
concepts.name: Tungsten Hexafluoride
concepts.description: CVD precursor for tungsten metal fill in vias and contacts

concepts.label: Material
concepts.name: CMP Tungsten Slurry
concepts.description: Abrasive slurry for CMP planarization of tungsten plugs in ICs

concepts.label: Material
concepts.name: CMP Copper Slurry
concepts.description: Abrasive slurry for copper interconnect CMP planarization

concepts.label: Material
concepts.name: CMP Polishing Pad
concepts.description: Polyurethane pad used with slurry in CMP; consumable; Cabot/DuPont/CMC major suppliers

concepts.label: Material
concepts.name: TEOS
concepts.description: CVD precursor for silicon dioxide deposition (gate oxide, ILD)

concepts.label: Material
concepts.name: Hafnium Oxide Precursor
concepts.description: ALD precursor for high-k gate dielectric (HfO2) in sub-10nm transistors

concepts.label: Material
concepts.name: Cobalt Metal
concepts.description: Used as copper interconnect liner/barrier at 7nm and below; replaces titanium nitride

concepts.label: Material
concepts.name: Ruthenium
concepts.description: Next-generation metal for sub-3nm interconnects; lower resistance than cobalt or tungsten

concepts.label: Material
concepts.name: Gallium Metal
concepts.description: Critical material for GaN power chips and semiconductors; China controls ~80% of global production

concepts.label: Material
concepts.name: Germanium
concepts.description: Used in SiGe transistors and fiber optics; China controls ~60% of global refining

concepts.label: Material
concepts.name: Neodymium
concepts.description: Rare earth for permanent magnets in motors, wind turbines, hard drives; China dominates supply

concepts.label: Material
concepts.name: Dysprosium
concepts.description: Rare earth added to NdFeB magnets for high-temperature performance; China near-monopoly

concepts.label: Material
concepts.name: Indium
concepts.description: Used in ITO (transparent conductor) and InP photonics; byproduct of zinc smelting

concepts.label: Material
concepts.name: HBM3E Memory Stack
concepts.description: Stacked DRAM with TSV interconnect; primary memory for AI accelerators (H100, MI300X)

concepts.label: Material
concepts.name: CoWoS Interposer
concepts.description: Silicon interposer enabling high-bandwidth connections between GPU die and HBM stacks

concepts.label: Material
concepts.name: Through-Silicon Via
concepts.description: Vertical electrical interconnect through silicon die; essential for HBM stacking and 3D ICs

concepts.label: Material
concepts.name: Micro-bump
concepts.description: Copper pillar connections between stacked dies; smaller pitch than traditional solder balls

concepts.label: Material
concepts.name: Hybrid Bond Pad
concepts.description: Oxide-to-oxide and Cu-to-Cu bonding for highest-density die stacking; no solder needed

concepts.label: Material
concepts.name: Tin Droplets
concepts.description: Tin droplets vaporized by Trumpf CO2 laser to create 13.5nm EUV plasma source in ASML scanners

concepts.label: Material
concepts.name: EUV Mirror
concepts.description: Multilayer molybdenum/silicon mirror reflecting 13.5nm EUV light; made by Zeiss

concepts.label: Material
concepts.name: High-NA EUV Optics
concepts.description: Custom optics for ASML NXE:3800E High-NA scanner; only Zeiss can make them

concepts.label: Material
concepts.name: Spin-on Carbon
concepts.description: Organic planarizing layer used in EUV multi-patterning processes

concepts.label: Material
concepts.name: Underfill Epoxy
concepts.description: Epoxy filled under flip-chip package to absorb thermal stress; Namics, Henkel suppliers

concepts.label: Material
concepts.name: Thermal Interface Material
concepts.description: Material between chip and heat spreader for thermal conductivity; indium foil preferred for AI chips

concepts.label: Material
concepts.name: Mold Compound
concepts.description: Epoxy resin protecting chip package; Sumitomo Bakelite and Showa Denko KM main suppliers

concepts.label: Material
concepts.name: Low-k Dielectric
concepts.description: Insulating layer between copper interconnects; reduces capacitance; fragile at sub-7nm

concepts.label: Material
concepts.name: High-k Dielectric
concepts.description: Hafnium oxide gate dielectric replacing SiO2 below 45nm; prevents leakage current

concepts.label: Process
concepts.name: EUV Lithography
concepts.description: Patterning process using 13.5nm light; required for 7nm and below logic; ASML sole scanner supplier

concepts.label: Process
concepts.name: High-NA EUV Lithography
concepts.description: Next-gen EUV with 0.55NA enabling sub-2nm patterning; ASML NXE:3800E; first units 2024

concepts.label: Process
concepts.name: ArF Immersion Lithography
concepts.description: Water-immersion 193nm lithography; still dominant for most layers even at 3nm with multi-patterning

concepts.label: Process
concepts.name: SADP
concepts.description: Multi-patterning technique doubling effective resolution of DUV; requires 2x masks per layer

concepts.label: Process
concepts.name: SAQP
concepts.description: Multi-patterning technique quadrupling effective resolution; used for DRAM cell patterning

concepts.label: Process
concepts.name: ALD
concepts.description: Atomic-scale conformal thin film deposition; critical for high-k gate and 3D NAND liners

concepts.label: Process
concepts.name: PECVD
concepts.description: Plasma-assisted CVD for dielectrics at lower temperatures; dominant for ILD deposition

concepts.label: Process
concepts.name: PVD Sputtering
concepts.description: Physical deposition of metal films (Al, Ta, Ti, Cu seed) by sputtering; not conformal

concepts.label: Process
concepts.name: CMP
concepts.description: Planarization using abrasive slurry and polishing pad; critical after every metal layer

concepts.label: Process
concepts.name: Plasma Etch
concepts.description: Anisotropic etch using plasma radicals; primary patterning etch step after lithography

concepts.label: Process
concepts.name: Atomic Layer Etch
concepts.description: Digital etch removing exactly one atomic layer per cycle; enables sub-5nm precision

concepts.label: Process
concepts.name: Ion Implant
concepts.description: Doping process injecting dopant ions into silicon; controls transistor threshold voltage

concepts.label: Process
concepts.name: Copper Damascene
concepts.description: Copper interconnect formation: etch trenches/vias, deposit Cu, CMP excess; standard since 180nm

concepts.label: Process
concepts.name: CoWoS Packaging
concepts.description: TSMC's proprietary 2.5D packaging integrating GPU die and HBM on silicon interposer on substrate

concepts.label: Process
concepts.name: SoIC Stacking
concepts.description: TSMC's 3D stacking using hybrid bonding (no bumps); enables ultra-dense die-to-die connections

concepts.label: Process
concepts.name: Hybrid Bonding
concepts.description: Cu-to-Cu and oxide bonding at wafer or die level; highest-density 3D interconnect

concepts.label: Process
concepts.name: Flip-Chip Bonding
concepts.description: Die flipped face-down onto substrate, connected via solder bumps; standard for CPUs/GPUs

concepts.label: Process
concepts.name: TSV Formation
concepts.description: Forming vertical conductors through silicon wafer using DRIE and copper plating

concepts.label: Process
concepts.name: Wafer Sort
concepts.description: Testing dice on wafer before dicing; identifies KGD; uses probe cards at wafer level

concepts.label: Process
concepts.name: FOPLP
concepts.description: Cost-effective advanced packaging on large rectangular panels vs round wafers

concepts.label: Equipment
concepts.name: ASML NXE:3600D
concepts.description: ASML's high-volume EUV scanner; ~0.33NA; workhorse for TSMC 5nm/3nm production

concepts.label: Equipment
concepts.name: ASML NXE:3800E
concepts.description: First High-NA (0.55NA) EUV scanner; anamorphic optics from Zeiss; first units to Intel 2024

concepts.label: Equipment
concepts.name: ASML TWINSCAN NXT DUV
concepts.description: ASML's DUV immersion scanner; ArF 193nm; still used for most non-critical layers

concepts.label: Equipment
concepts.name: Applied Materials Centura CVD
concepts.description: Applied Materials' modular CVD/ALD platform; configurable for different deposition chemistries

concepts.label: Equipment
concepts.name: Lam Research Flex Etch
concepts.description: Lam's flagship dielectric and conductor etch system; used at TSMC, Samsung, Intel

concepts.label: Equipment
concepts.name: Lam Research Striker ALD
concepts.description: Lam's batch ALD system for conformal film deposition in 3D NAND and logic

concepts.label: Equipment
concepts.name: Applied Materials Mirra CMP
concepts.description: Applied Materials' CMP polisher; dominant in copper and tungsten CMP applications

concepts.label: Equipment
concepts.name: KLA Puma Defect Inspection
concepts.description: KLA's optical inspection system for unpatterned and patterned wafer defects

concepts.label: Equipment
concepts.name: KLA Archer Overlay Metrology
concepts.description: KLA's overlay metrology tool measuring alignment between lithography layers

concepts.label: Equipment
concepts.name: Tokyo Electron CLEAN TRACK
concepts.description: TEL's wafer track system for photoresist coat and develop steps; used at TSMC, Samsung

concepts.label: Equipment
concepts.name: Axcelis Purion H Ion Implanter
concepts.description: Axcelis high-current ion implanter; dominant in advanced logic and memory doping

concepts.label: Equipment
concepts.name: Kokusai Electric Vertical Furnace
concepts.description: Batch vertical furnace for ALD and thermal oxidation; cost-effective for many-wafer batches

concepts.label: Equipment
concepts.name: Disco DFL Laser Saw
concepts.description: Disco's laser dicing system for wafer singulation without mechanical damage

concepts.label: Equipment
concepts.name: Besi Datacon Die Bonder
concepts.description: Besi's die bonder for thermocompression bonding (TCB) in advanced packaging

concepts.label: Equipment
concepts.name: Applied Materials Endura PVD
concepts.description: Applied Materials' PVD cluster tool for metal barrier and seed layer deposition

concepts.label: Equipment
concepts.name: Screen Holdings Spin Coater
concepts.description: Spin coater for photoresist and dielectric film application; used in lithography track

concepts.label: Equipment
concepts.name: Hermes Microvision E-Beam Inspector
concepts.description: ASML's e-beam wafer inspection for logic chip defects at 3nm and below

concepts.label: Equipment
concepts.name: Cymer XLA EUV Source
concepts.description: EUV plasma light source generating 13.5nm light by irradiating tin droplets with CO2 laser

concepts.label: Geography
concepts.name: Taiwan
concepts.description: Hosts TSMC and UMC foundries producing ~90% of world's advanced logic chips; extreme geopolitical risk

concepts.label: Geography
concepts.name: South Korea
concepts.description: Hosts Samsung and SK Hynix; produces ~70% of global DRAM and significant NAND

concepts.label: Geography
concepts.name: Japan
concepts.description: Critical materials hub: silicon wafers, photoresists, chemicals; also key equipment supplier

concepts.label: Geography
concepts.name: United States
concepts.description: Home of fabless chip designers (NVIDIA, AMD, Qualcomm) and equipment makers (AMAT, Lam, KLA)

concepts.label: Geography
concepts.name: Netherlands
concepts.description: Hosts ASML — sole EUV scanner manufacturer; extreme single-country concentration risk

concepts.label: Geography
concepts.name: Germany
concepts.description: Hosts Zeiss (EUV optics) and Siltronic (wafers) and Merck (materials); engineering powerhouse

concepts.label: Geography
concepts.name: China
concepts.description: Controls ~80% gallium, ~60% germanium, ~85% rare earths; has SMIC foundry; under US export controls

concepts.label: Geography
concepts.name: Ukraine
concepts.description: Pre-2022 supplied ~70% of global neon gas used in ArF excimer lasers; supply disrupted by war

concepts.label: Geography
concepts.name: Malaysia
concepts.description: Major OSAT and semiconductor assembly hub; hosts Intel, Infineon, Renesas back-end fabs

concepts.label: Geography
concepts.name: Israel
concepts.description: Hosts Intel fab (Kiryat Gat), Tower Semiconductor, and semiconductor IP companies

concepts.label: Geography
concepts.name: Arizona USA
concepts.description: Site of TSMC Fab 21 (N4, N3, N2 planned), Intel Fab 52/62; key US advanced logic investment

concepts.label: Geography
concepts.name: Hsinchu Science Park
concepts.description: Concentration of TSMC HQ, MediaTek, Realtek and supply chain; existential risk if Taiwan crisis

concepts.label: Regulation
concepts.name: CHIPS and Science Act
concepts.description: US law providing $52B for domestic semiconductor manufacturing and R&D; guardrails prevent China investment

concepts.label: Regulation
concepts.name: Export Administration Regulations
concepts.description: US export control framework governing semiconductor equipment and chip exports; key tool in chip war

concepts.label: Regulation
concepts.name: Entity List
concepts.description: US list of entities requiring license (often denied) for exports; includes SMIC, Huawei, CXMT

concepts.label: Regulation
concepts.name: Foreign Direct Product Rule
concepts.description: Extends US export controls to foreign-made products using US technology/software; applies globally

concepts.label: Regulation
concepts.name: Japan Semiconductor Export Controls 2023
concepts.description: Japan restricted export of 23 advanced semiconductor manufacturing equipment types from July 2023

concepts.label: Regulation
concepts.name: Netherlands ASML Export License
concepts.description: Netherlands restricts ASML from shipping EUV and some DUV scanners to China without license

concepts.label: Regulation
concepts.name: China Gallium and Germanium Export Controls
concepts.description: China's export restrictions on gallium, germanium, graphite, and rare earths as geopolitical leverage

concepts.label: Regulation
concepts.name: Wassenaar Arrangement
concepts.description: Multilateral export control regime covering dual-use goods; 42 member states coordinate technology export controls

concepts.label: Regulation
concepts.name: US-China Chip War Restrictions
concepts.description: Series of US export controls (Oct 2022, Oct 2023, Oct 2024) restricting advanced AI chip and equipment exports to China

properties.target: AI chips and equipment to China

concepts.label: Regulation
concepts.name: European Chips Act
concepts.description: EU initiative to double Europe's share of global chip production to 20% by 2030; €43B investment

concepts.label: Technology
concepts.name: NVIDIA H100 GPU
concepts.description: NVIDIA's Hopper-architecture GPU; primary chip for LLM training; manufactured on TSMC N4; uses HBM3

concepts.label: Technology
concepts.name: NVIDIA H200 GPU
concepts.description: Enhanced H100 with HBM3E memory (141GB); faster memory bandwidth for LLM inference

concepts.label: Technology
concepts.name: NVIDIA B200 GPU
concepts.description: NVIDIA Blackwell GPU; 2x reticle NVL packaging; 2nm-class process; massive AI training leap

concepts.label: Technology
concepts.name: AMD MI300X GPU
concepts.description: AMD's AI accelerator with 192GB HBM3; competitive with H100; manufactured on TSMC N5/N6

concepts.label: Technology
concepts.name: Google TPU v5p
concepts.description: Google's custom AI training chip (tensor processing unit); used exclusively in Google Cloud

concepts.label: Technology
concepts.name: AWS Trainium2
concepts.description: AWS custom AI training chip; 2nd gen Trainium for LLM training in AWS Cloud

concepts.label: Technology
concepts.name: 3nm Process Node
concepts.description: TSMC's 3nm node; uses EUV and multi-patterning; Apple M3/A17 first production; NVIDIA Blackwell next

concepts.label: Technology
concepts.name: 2nm Process Node
concepts.description: TSMC's 2nm node using Gate-All-Around (GAA) transistors; planned production 2025

concepts.label: Technology
concepts.name: 4nm Process Node
concepts.description: TSMC's 4nm node; production node for NVIDIA H100, H200, Apple A16; EUV-based

concepts.label: Technology
concepts.name: HBM3E
concepts.description: Latest HBM generation used in H200 and MI300X; 141-192GB capacity, up to 5.6 TB/s bandwidth

concepts.label: Technology
concepts.name: LLM Training Cluster
concepts.description: Large-scale compute cluster for training foundation models; consumes thousands of H100/H200 GPUs

concepts.label: Technology
concepts.name: UCIe
concepts.description: Open standard for die-to-die interconnect enabling multi-vendor chiplet ecosystems

concepts.label: Technology
concepts.name: NVLink
concepts.description: NVIDIA's proprietary high-bandwidth GPU-to-GPU interconnect; 900 GB/s in NVLink 4.0

concepts.label: Technology
concepts.name: InfiniBand NDR
concepts.description: High-speed networking for GPU cluster scale-out; 400Gbps per port; Mellanox/NVIDIA

concepts.label: Technology
concepts.name: Chiplet Architecture
concepts.description: Design paradigm assembling multiple smaller dies into one package; enables yield improvement and heterogeneous integration

concepts.label: Technology
concepts.name: 2.5D Packaging
concepts.description: Integration of multiple dies on a common interposer (silicon or organic) for high bandwidth die-to-die connectivity

concepts.label: Technology
concepts.name: 3D IC Stacking
concepts.description: Stacking dies vertically with TSV or hybrid bonding connections; highest density integration

concepts.label: Technology
concepts.name: CXL Memory
concepts.description: PCIe-based protocol for coherent memory expansion; enables memory pooling in AI data centers

concepts.label: Technology
concepts.name: Silicon Photonics
concepts.description: Optical components integrated on silicon chip; enables co-packaged optics for AI data center bandwidth

concepts.label: Technology
concepts.name: Generative AI
concepts.description: AI paradigm requiring massive GPU compute for training; primary demand driver for advanced chips

concepts.label: Geography
concepts.name: United Kingdom
concepts.description: Home of Arm Holdings (CPU IP) and semiconductor design firms

concepts.label: Geography
concepts.name: Singapore
concepts.description: Regional OSAT and wafer fab hub; GlobalFoundries Singapore fab, Micron DRAM fab

concepts.label: Geography
concepts.name: Ireland
concepts.description: Intel's European manufacturing base (Fab 24/34 in Leixlip); significant EU chip production

concepts.label: Geography
concepts.name: Dresden Germany
concepts.description: Germany's semiconductor hub: GlobalFoundries Fab 1, Infineon, Bosch, future TSMC fab

concepts.label: Geography
concepts.name: Kumamoto Japan
concepts.description: TSMC's first Japan fab (JASM joint venture with Sony/Denso); 28/22nm production

concepts.label: Geography
concepts.name: India
concepts.description: Emerging semiconductor destination; Tata Electronics and Micron assembly/test fabs announced

concepts.label: Geography
concepts.name: Eindhoven Netherlands
concepts.description: ASML's global headquarters and primary engineering/manufacturing site for EUV scanners

concepts.label: Geography
concepts.name: Luhansk Ukraine
concepts.description: Ukrainian industrial region that historically housed primary neon purification plants (Cryoin, Ingas)

concepts.label: Company
concepts.name: Infineon Technologies
concepts.description: German semiconductor maker; power ICs, automotive, security â€” top automotive chip supplier

concepts.label: Company
concepts.name: NXP Semiconductors
concepts.description: Automotive, IoT and security chips; largest automotive semiconductor maker after Renesas

concepts.label: Company
concepts.name: Renesas Electronics
concepts.description: Japan's largest chip maker; automotive microcontrollers and SoCs

concepts.label: Company
concepts.name: STMicroelectronics
concepts.description: European IDM: STM8/STM32 MCUs, automotive ICs, SiC power devices

concepts.label: Company
concepts.name: Texas Instruments
concepts.description: Analog and embedded processing chips; owns numerous 300mm analog fabs; cash-flow leader

concepts.label: Company
concepts.name: Wolfspeed
concepts.description: SiC wafer and power device maker; sole US-based SiC substrate manufacturer at scale

concepts.label: Company
concepts.name: Onsemi
concepts.description: SiC and power semiconductor devices for EV charging; competes with STM, Infineon

concepts.label: Company
concepts.name: Bosch Semiconductors
concepts.description: Automotive IDM; SiC power modules; new 300mm fab in Dresden

concepts.label: Company
concepts.name: Analog Devices
concepts.description: Analog/mixed-signal chips for industrial, auto, and communications

concepts.label: Company
concepts.name: Microchip Technology
concepts.description: Microcontrollers, FPGAs, and analog chips for embedded systems

concepts.label: Company
concepts.name: IMEC
concepts.description: Belgium R&D consortium; EUV and sub-2nm research; TSMC/ASML partner

concepts.label: Company
concepts.name: Cryoin Engineering
concepts.description: Ukrainian neon gas purifier; one of two main global neon suppliers (Luhansk-based); disrupted post-2022

concepts.label: Company
concepts.name: Ingas
concepts.description: Ukrainian neon gas supplier (Mariupol); plant destroyed in 2022 war; major supply shock

concepts.label: Company
concepts.name: Air Liquide
concepts.description: French industrial gas company; semiconductor-grade gases for fabs; working to replace Ukrainian neon

concepts.label: Company
concepts.name: Linde plc
concepts.description: Largest industrial gas company; ultra-pure gases for semiconductor fabs worldwide

concepts.label: Company
concepts.name: Murata Manufacturing
concepts.description: Passive component maker (MLCC capacitors, inductors); critical for all electronic assemblies

concepts.label: Company
concepts.name: TDK Corporation
concepts.description: Passive components, sensors, magnets; NdFeB magnet major supplier

concepts.label: Company
concepts.name: Samsung Foundry
concepts.description: Samsung's contract foundry division; 3nm GAA production; main TSMC competitor

concepts.label: Company
concepts.name: Intel Foundry
concepts.description: Intel's new foundry business targeting external customers with Intel 18A process (2025)

concepts.label: Company
concepts.name: TSMC Arizona
concepts.description: TSMC's US fab in Phoenix AZ; N4P production started 2024; N2 planned 2026

concepts.label: Company
concepts.name: Entegris Microelectronics
concepts.description: Advanced purity materials: EUV photochemicals, CMP slurries, gas filters; acquired CMC Materials

concepts.label: Company
concepts.name: Nova Ltd
concepts.description: Optical CD and thin-film metrology systems; fast-growing KLA competitor

concepts.label: Company
concepts.name: Camtek
concepts.description: 2D/3D metrology and inspection for advanced packaging; strong in HBM and CoWoS inspection

concepts.label: Company
concepts.name: Onto Innovation
concepts.description: Process control: overlay, thin-film, and inspection; third player after KLA and AMAT in metrology

concepts.label: Company
concepts.name: Mattson Technology
concepts.description: Thermal processing (RTP, batch anneal) systems; majority owned by China's Hua Hong group

concepts.label: Material
concepts.name: Silicon Carbide Substrate
concepts.description: Wide-bandgap substrate for power devices in EVs; supply tightly controlled by Wolfspeed, Coherent

concepts.label: Material
concepts.name: GaN-on-Silicon
concepts.description: Power device substrate grown on silicon; used in chargers, RF, and power supplies

concepts.label: Material
concepts.name: Glass Substrate
concepts.description: Next-gen packaging substrate using glass instead of organic resin; Intel pioneering for 2026+

concepts.label: Material
concepts.name: ArF Photoresist
concepts.description: Photoresist for KrF 248nm lithography; used for mature nodes and back-end layers

concepts.label: Material
concepts.name: MLCC Capacitor
concepts.description: Passive component essential in every PCB and package; Murata near-monopoly on high-cap types

concepts.label: Material
concepts.name: Palladium
concepts.description: Used in bond wire for IC packaging; Russia major producer; price spiked during Russia sanctions

concepts.label: Material
concepts.name: Gold Wire
concepts.description: Traditional wire bonding material; being replaced by copper wire but still used in high-reliability

concepts.label: Material
concepts.name: Copper Wire
concepts.description: Lower-cost replacement for gold wire bonding; now dominant in consumer electronics

concepts.label: Material
concepts.name: Nitrogen Gas
concepts.description: Purge and carrier gas used throughout semiconductor fabs; produced locally via PSA/membrane

concepts.label: Material
concepts.name: Hydrogen Gas
concepts.description: Carrier gas for epitaxy and anneal steps; produced on-site; explosive handling requirements

concepts.label: Material
concepts.name: Phosphine
concepts.description: N-type dopant source gas for CVD and ion implant in silicon; highly toxic

concepts.label: Material
concepts.name: Diborane
concepts.description: P-type dopant gas for CVD boron doping; highly toxic and pyrophoric

concepts.label: Material
concepts.name: Tungsten Metal
concepts.description: Metal fill for contacts and vias in logic chips; deposited by CVD using WF6

concepts.label: Material
concepts.name: Copper Interconnect
concepts.description: Main metal for BEOL wiring layers in all advanced logic chips since 130nm node

concepts.label: Material
concepts.name: Titanium Nitride
concepts.description: Barrier/liner metal deposited by PVD or ALD to prevent copper diffusion into dielectric

concepts.label: Material
concepts.name: Fused Silica
concepts.description: Ultra-pure quartz used for DUV optical components (lenses, windows); HERAEUS key supplier

concepts.label: Material
concepts.name: Photomask Blank
concepts.description: Glass substrate coated with chromium used to make photomasks; Hoya near-monopoly for EUV blanks

concepts.label: Material
concepts.name: Silicon Nitride
concepts.description: Barrier and hard mask material; deposited by LPCVD or ALD; used in CMP stop layers

concepts.label: Material
concepts.name: Tantalum
concepts.description: Transition metal used as diffusion barrier for copper interconnects; Congo primary source

concepts.label: Material
concepts.name: Coltan
concepts.description: Ore yielding tantalum and niobium; ~70% mined in DR Congo; conflict mineral designation

concepts.label: Material
concepts.name: Lanthanum
concepts.description: Rare earth used in high-k gate dielectrics and optical coatings; China dominates supply

concepts.label: Material
concepts.name: EUV Source Collector Mirror
concepts.description: Large ellipsoidal mirror collecting and directing EUV plasma light toward scanner optics; ASML proprietary

concepts.label: Material
concepts.name: DUV Immersion Water
concepts.description: Ultrapure water used as immersion fluid in 193nm lithography; fab produces 100s of liters/min

concepts.label: Material
concepts.name: NdFeB Permanent Magnet
concepts.description: Strongest commercial magnets; used in EV motors, wind turbines, hard drives; China dominates 90%

concepts.label: Material
concepts.name: Indium Tin Oxide
concepts.description: Transparent conductive coating for touchscreens, displays; indium supply risk

concepts.label: Process
concepts.name: Epitaxial Growth
concepts.description: Growing crystalline semiconductor layer on substrate; used for strained silicon and SiGe channels

concepts.label: Process
concepts.name: Thermal Oxidation
concepts.description: Growing SiO2 by exposing silicon to oxygen at high temperature; legacy gate dielectric

concepts.label: Process
concepts.name: Rapid Thermal Processing
concepts.description: Short-duration high-temperature annealing for dopant activation without diffusion broadening

concepts.label: Process
concepts.name: Wafer Dicing
concepts.description: Cutting wafer into individual dies by blade saw or laser; Disco dominant equipment supplier

concepts.label: Process
concepts.name: Wire Bonding
concepts.description: Connecting die bond pads to package leads with fine wire; still dominant in mature-node packages

concepts.label: Process
concepts.name: Encapsulation
concepts.description: Encapsulating packaged chip in epoxy mold compound to protect from environment

concepts.label: Process
concepts.name: Wafer Thinning
concepts.description: Grinding wafer backside to reduce thickness for 3D stacking; critical for TSV height reduction

concepts.label: Process
concepts.name: Electrochemical Deposition
concepts.description: Electroplating copper into TSV holes and damascene trenches; Lam/Applied dominant suppliers

concepts.label: Process
concepts.name: Laser Ablation
concepts.description: Using laser to drill vias in organic substrates; critical for HDI substrate fabrication

concepts.label: Process
concepts.name: Under Bump Metallization
concepts.description: Metal stack deposited under solder bumps to ensure reliable adhesion and electrical contact

concepts.label: Process
concepts.name: Solder Ball Attach
concepts.description: Attaching solder balls to BGA package pads for PCB mounting

concepts.label: Process
concepts.name: Photomask Writing
concepts.description: Writing IC patterns onto photomask blanks using e-beam or laser direct write

concepts.label: Process
concepts.name: OPC
concepts.description: Computational lithography modifying mask patterns to compensate for diffraction; compute-intensive

concepts.label: Process
concepts.name: Atomic Layer Epitaxy
concepts.description: Monolayer-by-monolayer epitaxial deposition using ALD chemistry; for ultrathin channel layers

concepts.label: Process
concepts.name: Die Attach
concepts.description: Attaching die to substrate or leadframe with epoxy or solder; first step of back-end assembly

concepts.label: Process
concepts.name: Fan-Out Wafer Level Packaging
concepts.description: Reconstituted wafer packaging where RDL connects dies without a substrate

concepts.label: Process
concepts.name: Wafer Bonding
concepts.description: Bonding two wafers at oxide or semiconductor surface without adhesive; enables 3D integration

concepts.label: Process
concepts.name: Chemical Vapor Infiltration
concepts.description: Densification of ceramic composites; used for SiC components in high-temp fab chambers

concepts.label: Process
concepts.name: Lithographic Simulation
concepts.description: Computational modeling of lithography and process steps using TCAD tools

concepts.label: Process
concepts.name: Burn-in Testing
concepts.description: Accelerated life testing at elevated voltage/temperature to screen early-failure chips

concepts.label: Equipment
concepts.name: Nikon NSR DUV Scanner
concepts.description: Nikon's ArF immersion DUV scanner; ASML's main competitor in lithography; losing market share

concepts.label: Equipment
concepts.name: Canon Lithography System
concepts.description: Canon's i-line and KrF steppers; used for mature nodes; third player in lithography

concepts.label: Equipment
concepts.name: Applied Materials Producer ALD
concepts.description: Applied Materials' ALD system for high-k gate dielectric and 3D NAND liners

concepts.label: Equipment
concepts.name: TEL Vigus Etch System
concepts.description: Tokyo Electron's conductor and dielectric etch chambers; strong at TSMC and Samsung

concepts.label: Equipment
concepts.name: Applied Materials VIISta Ion Implanter
concepts.description: Applied Materials' ion implanter family; competes with Axcelis in advanced node doping

concepts.label: Equipment
concepts.name: Applied Materials Vantage RTP
concepts.description: Applied Materials' rapid thermal processing system for dopant activation anneals

concepts.label: Equipment
concepts.name: Ebara CMP Polisher
concepts.description: Ebara's CMP polishing system; competes with Applied Materials Mirra in copper CMP

concepts.label: Equipment
concepts.name: Bruker XRF Metrology
concepts.description: X-ray fluorescence and XRD metrology for thin film composition and stress measurement

concepts.label: Equipment
concepts.name: Kulicke & Soffa Wire Bonder
concepts.description: Wire bonding equipment for connecting IC die to package; copper and gold wire capable

concepts.label: Equipment
concepts.name: Screen Holdings Wet Station
concepts.description: Wet chemical cleaning and etching stations; critical for wafer surface preparation

concepts.label: Equipment
concepts.name: Lam Research Altus CVD
concepts.description: Lam's CVD system for tungsten plug and contact fill deposition

concepts.label: Equipment
concepts.name: ASML YieldStar Metrology
concepts.description: ASML's integrated diffraction-based overlay metrology; feeds alignment correction loops in scanner

concepts.label: Equipment
concepts.name: PDF Solutions Cimetrix
concepts.description: Equipment data collection and semiconductor analytics software

concepts.label: Equipment
concepts.name: Entegris FOUP
concepts.description: Sealed wafer transport container maintaining cleanroom environment between process steps

concepts.label: Equipment
concepts.name: Brooks Automation Robot
concepts.description: Wafer handling robots for load ports and atmospheric transport between tools

concepts.label: Equipment
concepts.name: Hitachi CD-SEM
concepts.description: Hitachi's CD-SEM for measuring critical dimensions of patterned features; competes with Applied SEM

concepts.label: Equipment
concepts.name: Photron High-Speed Camera
concepts.description: Used in EUV source modules to image and control tin droplet targeting with microsecond precision

concepts.label: Equipment
concepts.name: CML Microsystems Inkjet Head
concepts.description: Piezo inkjet head generating uniform tin droplets for EUV plasma source

concepts.label: Equipment
concepts.name: Axcelis Purion XE Ion Implanter
concepts.description: High-energy ion implanter for deep well and retrograde well implants

concepts.label: Equipment
concepts.name: Cohu Test Handler
concepts.description: Automated test handlers for IC final test; gravity, pick-and-place, and strip test

concepts.label: Equipment
concepts.name: Teradyne ATE
concepts.description: Automated test equipment for wafer sort and final test of memory and logic chips

concepts.label: Equipment
concepts.name: Advantest ATE
concepts.description: Japanese ATE maker; strong in memory and mixed-signal test; competes with Teradyne

concepts.label: Technology
concepts.name: Intel 18A Process
concepts.description: Intel's 1.8nm-class process with RibbonFET (GAA) transistors and backside power delivery (PowerVia)

concepts.label: Technology
concepts.name: Samsung 3nm GAA
concepts.description: Samsung's 3nm process using Gate-All-Around (MBCFET) transistors; first GAA in production 2022

concepts.label: Technology
concepts.name: NVIDIA NVLink Switch
concepts.description: NVIDIA's high-bandwidth switch chip enabling all-to-all GPU connectivity in DGX/HGX systems

concepts.label: Technology
concepts.name: Coherent Optical Transceiver
concepts.description: High-speed optical transceivers for data center spine-leaf interconnect at 800G/1.6T

concepts.label: Technology
concepts.name: PCIe 6.0
concepts.description: 64 GT/s PCIe standard; enables high-bandwidth CPU-GPU and GPU-GPU connectivity

concepts.label: Technology
concepts.name: Backside Power Delivery
concepts.description: Routing power to transistors from wafer backside, freeing frontside for signal routing; Intel pioneered

concepts.label: Technology
concepts.name: Gate-All-Around Transistor
concepts.description: Next-gen transistor wrapping gate on all 4 sides of channel nanosheet; enables sub-3nm scaling

concepts.label: Technology
concepts.name: FinFET Transistor
concepts.description: Tri-gate transistor used from 22nm to 3nm; being replaced by GAA at 2nm and below

concepts.label: Technology
concepts.name: DRAM
concepts.description: Main system memory for computers; Samsung, SK Hynix, Micron produce >95% globally

concepts.label: Technology
concepts.name: NAND Flash
concepts.description: Non-volatile storage; 3D stacking enables 200+ layer density; Samsung, Kioxia, Micron dominant

concepts.label: Technology
concepts.name: AI Inference Chip
concepts.description: Chips optimized for running trained AI models; lower power than training chips; NVIDIA, Qualcomm, Apple

concepts.label: Technology
concepts.name: 5nm Process Node
concepts.description: TSMC 5nm node; high-volume since 2020; Apple A14, AMD Zen 3; still major revenue driver

concepts.label: Technology
concepts.name: Autonomous Vehicle SoC
concepts.description: High-performance SoCs for autonomous driving (NVIDIA DRIVE, Mobileye EyeQ, Qualcomm Snapdragon Ride)

concepts.label: Technology
concepts.name: Power Semiconductor
concepts.description: High-voltage/current switching devices for EVs, renewable energy, industrial; SiC increasingly dominant

concepts.label: Technology
concepts.name: Photonic Integrated Circuit
concepts.description: Chip integrating optical components (lasers, modulators, detectors) for ultra-high-bandwidth comms

concepts.label: Regulation
concepts.name: India Semiconductor Mission
concepts.description: India government scheme subsidizing semiconductor fabs and OSAT facilities; â‚¹76,000 crore (~$9B)

concepts.label: Regulation
concepts.name: EU Critical Raw Materials Act
concepts.description: EU law to secure supply of 34 critical raw materials; 10% extraction and 40% processing in EU by 2030

concepts.label: Regulation
concepts.name: Korea K-Chips Act
concepts.description: Korea's tax credit scheme for semiconductor capex (up to 25% for large firms, 35% for SMEs)

concepts.label: Regulation
concepts.name: Japan Economic Security Promotion Act
concepts.description: Japan law securing supply chains for 11 critical goods including semiconductors; fab subsidies

concepts.label: Regulation
concepts.name: ITAR
concepts.description: US export control for defense-related technologies; some semiconductor equipment classified under ITAR
